title: 业务英语闯关
summary: 500 道分级客观题，以支付业务策略运营为主线，并覆盖邮件、会议、汇报、谈判、跨区域协作和英文面试。每题都标记难度，可直接查看英文参考答案及中文翻译。
story: 从基础支付表达开始，逐步处理经营分析、商户运营、风险定价、市场策略与高层决策，在真实业务情境中建立可调用的英文表达。

levels.title: 支付术语基础
levels.subtitle: 在支付术语基础场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释支付术语基础问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 1 关 · 基础表达
levels.story: 你需要围绕支付术语基础完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 支付术语速查卡
reward.description: 完成本章后，下面这些表达可以直接用于支付业务沟通。
items: Authorization reserves funds; settlement moves funds.
A chargeback is initiated through the issuing bank.
Review pricing together with unit economics.

questions.title: 授权、请款与结算

activity.prompt: 哪一句最准确地解释 authorization？
choices: Authorization means the merchant has received settled funds.
Authorization checks and temporarily reserves available funds.
Authorization is a dispute initiated by the cardholder.
activity.feedback: 授权阶段检查并预留额度，资金尚未结算给商户。

questions.prompt: 一位海外同事把 authorization、capture 和 settlement 当成同一个动作。你需要在会议中澄清三者的先后关系。
questions.task: 用 3 至 5 句英文解释三个阶段，并说明授权成功不代表商户已经收到钱。
questions.hint: 按“检查并预留额度 → 确认扣款 → 资金划转”的顺序组织。

answer.sample: Authorization checks whether the customer has sufficient funds or credit and temporarily reserves the amount. Capture confirms that the merchant wants to complete the charge. Settlement happens later, when funds are transferred through the payment chain to the merchant's account. Therefore, an approved authorization does not mean that the merchant has already received the money.
notes: 先用动词说明每一步做什么，再交代资金是否真正移动。
最后一句明确纠正常见误解。

questions.title: 退款与拒付
questions.prompt: 客服团队询问 refund 和 chargeback 为什么不能使用同一套处理流程。
questions.task: 用英文说明两者由谁发起、资金如何退回，以及商户面临的额外影响。
questions.hint: 从 initiator、process 和 merchant impact 三个维度对比。

answer.sample: A refund is initiated by the merchant and sends money back through the original payment method. A chargeback is initiated by the cardholder through the issuing bank to dispute a transaction. The merchant may submit evidence, but can also face dispute fees and a higher chargeback ratio. That is why chargebacks require a separate investigation workflow.
notes: 使用 is initiated by 清楚交代发起方。
chargeback 还包括举证、费用和比率风险。

questions.title: 支付链路参与方
questions.prompt: 新同事不清楚 issuer、acquirer、card network 和 PSP 分别服务谁。
questions.task: 以一笔银行卡支付为例，用英文介绍四类参与方的职责。
questions.hint: 从持卡人一侧讲到商户一侧，再补充 PSP 的连接作用。

answer.sample: The issuer provides the card to the customer and decides whether to approve the transaction. The card network routes messages between the issuing and acquiring sides. The acquirer provides card acceptance services to the merchant. A PSP connects the merchant to one or more acquirers and payment methods through a unified service.
notes: issuer 对应 customer，acquirer 对应 merchant。
PSP 的价值用 unified service 概括，避免把它误说成银行。

questions.title: KYC、KYB 与 AML
questions.prompt: 产品团队想把商户入驻审核统称为 KYC，合规同事要求你说明术语边界。
questions.task: 用英文区分 KYC、KYB 和 AML，并说明三者如何共同出现在商户入驻流程中。
questions.hint: 先区分 customer 与 business，再说明 AML 是持续性的风险框架。

answer.sample: KYC verifies an individual customer's identity, while KYB verifies a business, including its registration and ownership. AML is the broader framework for preventing money laundering. During merchant onboarding, we perform KYB on the company, KYC on relevant beneficial owners, and AML screening and monitoring based on risk.
notes: beneficial owners 是商户审核中的高频表达。
AML 不只是一次 screening，还可能包含持续 monitoring。

questions.title: 费率与净收入
questions.prompt: 管理层看到 take rate 上升，认为净收入一定同比例增长，但支付通道成本也发生了变化。
questions.task: 用英文解释 take rate、gross revenue 和 net revenue 的关系，并指出需要同时查看成本。
questions.hint: 给出简短公式，再说明为什么单看费率不够。

answer.sample: Take rate is gross payment revenue divided by payment volume. Net revenue also depends on processing costs, network fees, incentives and losses. A higher take rate does not automatically produce the same increase in net revenue, so we should review both pricing and unit economics.
notes: 用 divided by 直接给出指标定义。
列出主要成本项，证明净收入不是只由费率决定。

questions.title: 支付术语基础：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Authorization, capture and settlement are separate stages in a card payment.
Because payment status accuracy matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、支付状态准确率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“支付术语基础”场景。已知团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付状态准确率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Authorization, capture and settlement are separate stages in a card payment. The current signal is that teams are using payment terms interchangeably and giving merchants conflicting explanations. I recommend that we publish one payment-flow glossary and use it in support, product and partner reviews.
notes: 表达必须围绕支付状态准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 支付术语基础：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“支付术语基础”场景。已知团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付状态准确率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline payment status accuracy needs context because teams are using payment terms interchangeably and giving merchants conflicting explanations. Evidence points to the operating playbook does not define ownership or the movement of funds at each stage. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that every status maps to one owner, customer message and reconciliation treatment.
notes: 表达必须围绕支付状态准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 支付术语基础：事故更新

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“事故更新”？
choices: We are investigating a situation in which teams are using payment terms interchangeably and giving merchants conflicting explanations.
Because payment status accuracy matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、支付状态准确率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“支付术语基础”场景。已知团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付状态准确率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: We are investigating a situation in which teams are using payment terms interchangeably and giving merchants conflicting explanations. Current evidence points to the operating playbook does not define ownership or the movement of funds at each stage, but the root cause is not yet final. We will publish one payment-flow glossary and use it in support, product and partner reviews and provide the next fact-based update at the agreed time.
notes: 表达必须围绕支付状态准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.title: 支付术语基础：提出建议
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“支付术语基础”场景。已知团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付状态准确率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: My recommendation is to publish one payment-flow glossary and use it in support, product and partner reviews. This directly addresses the evidence that the operating playbook does not define ownership or the movement of funds at each stage. We will track payment status accuracy and scale only if every status maps to one owner, customer message and reconciliation treatment.
notes: 表达必须围绕支付状态准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 支付术语基础：说明取舍

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“说明取舍”？
choices: The decision should balance speed with control.
Because payment status accuracy matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、支付状态准确率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“支付术语基础”场景。已知团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付状态准确率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The decision should balance speed with control. Although the proposal may improve payment status accuracy, the evidence shows that the operating playbook does not define ownership or the movement of funds at each stage. We should publish one payment-flow glossary and use it in support, product and partner reviews, but proceed only if every status maps to one owner, customer message and reconciliation treatment.
notes: 表达必须围绕支付状态准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

levels.title: 清晰商务写作
levels.subtitle: 在清晰商务写作场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释清晰商务写作问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 2 关 · 基础表达
levels.story: 你需要围绕清晰商务写作完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 结论先行邮件卡
reward.description: 三句话快速搭出一封行动明确的商务邮件。
items: I recommend ... because ...
The owner will complete ... by ...
Unless there are objections by ..., I will ...

questions.title: 结论先行改写

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合作为延期建议邮件的第一句？
choices: As you may already know, we have recently reviewed several issues.
I am writing this email to discuss the Brazil pilot.
I recommend moving the Brazil pilot from 12 August to 19 August.
activity.feedback: 首句直接写建议和日期，收件人不必从背景中寻找结论。

questions.prompt: 你建议将巴西试点推迟一周，因为退款接口尚未通过回归测试。
questions.task: 写一封不超过 90 词的英文邮件，第一句直接给出建议，再补充原因和下一步。
questions.hint: 使用 recommendation → evidence → next step 的结构。

answer.sample:
Subject: Recommendation to delay the Brazil pilot by one week

I recommend moving the Brazil pilot from 12 August to 19 August. The refund API has failed two regression cases, so launching now could create manual refunds and a poor merchant experience. Engineering will complete the fixes by Friday, and Operations will rerun the checklist on Monday. Unless there are objections by Thursday 3 p.m., I will update the launch plan.
notes: 标题和首句都直接写决策。
最后给出负责人、动作和异议截止时间。

questions.title: 礼貌请求数据
questions.prompt: 你需要欧洲团队在周三前提供过去八周各支付方式的成功率数据，他们本周任务很多。
questions.task: 用英文提出请求，说明用途、字段、截止时间，并给对方降低工作量的选项。
questions.hint: 礼貌不等于模糊，deadline 和 minimum scope 都要清楚。

answer.sample: Hi Elena, could you please share the last eight weeks of payment success rates by country and payment method by Wednesday noon? We need the data for the Q3 recovery plan. A CSV with week, country, method, attempts and successful payments is sufficient; no slides are needed. If the full extract is not available, the top five markets would still let us begin.
notes: 请求内容和用途都具体。
给出 minimum viable scope，降低整体延误概率。

questions.title: 项目延期通知
questions.prompt: 风控规则配置比计划晚两天，商户试点将从周一推迟到周三。
questions.task: 写一段英文延期通知，说明影响、原因、缓解措施和下次更新时间。
questions.hint: 不要只说 sorry for the delay，要让对方知道如何安排客户预期。

answer.sample: The merchant pilot will start on Wednesday instead of Monday because the final risk rules need two additional days of validation. No merchant data has been affected, but Sales should pause launch confirmations. The risk team is running an expedited review, and I will send a go/no-go update by Tuesday at 4 p.m.
notes: 第一句同时写清新旧时间和原因。
明确影响边界、缓解动作和下一更新时间。

questions.title: 行动型会议纪要
questions.prompt: 会议决定：数据团队周五给根因分析，产品团队下周二确认方案，运营团队下周三通知商户。
questions.task: 写一封简短英文纪要，包含决定、行动项、负责人和日期。
questions.hint: 重点不是复述讨论，而是固定 decision 和 action items。

answer.sample:
Decision: We will keep the current routing rule until the root cause and fix are reviewed.

Actions:
1. Data team — complete the root-cause analysis by Friday.
2. Product team — confirm the preferred solution by next Tuesday.
3. Operations — send the merchant notice by next Wednesday after approval.

Please reply by tomorrow noon if any owner or deadline is incorrect.
notes: 把 decision 与 actions 分开，便于扫读。
每个行动项使用 owner + verb + deadline。

questions.title: 向上升级问题
questions.prompt: 一个关键依赖连续两周没有负责人，已经威胁季度目标。你需要向总监升级，但不能显得在指责其他团队。
questions.task: 写一段英文升级说明：事实、业务影响、已尝试动作，以及需要总监做的决定。
questions.hint: 聚焦 unresolved dependency，不评价个人态度。

answer.sample: I am escalating an unresolved ownership gap in the payout reconciliation workstream. We requested an owner in the last two reviews, but the validation task remains unassigned. Without an owner by Friday, the Q3 migration is likely to slip by at least one week. The scope and effort are documented; could you help assign either the Finance Data or Payments Data team by Thursday?
notes: 使用可核验事实，不描述某团队不配合。
结尾提出二选一的明确决策请求。

questions.title: 清晰商务写作：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because decision turnaround time matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
A strong business message leads with the conclusion, evidence and requested action.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、决策周转时间和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“清晰商务写作”场景。已知管理者需要多轮追问才能理解决策事项和负责人，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、决策周转时间、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A strong business message leads with the conclusion, evidence and requested action. The current signal is that leaders need several follow-up messages before they understand the decision and owner. I recommend that we rewrite updates in BLUF format with a clear ask, owner and deadline.
notes: 表达必须围绕决策周转时间说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 清晰商务写作：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“清晰商务写作”场景。已知管理者需要多轮追问才能理解决策事项和负责人，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“说明取舍”？
choices: Because decision turnaround time matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.

items: The primary metric is reporting accuracy.
I recommend that we standardize metric sentences and show both the numerator and denominator.
We should scale only if every reported change can be reproduced from the cited data.

questions.title: 指标与数字表达：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because reporting accuracy matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
A useful metric statement includes the baseline, change, period and comparison.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、汇报准确率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“指标与数字表达”场景。已知看板称转化率提升百分之五，却没有说明是百分点还是相对增幅，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、汇报准确率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A useful metric statement includes the baseline, change, period and comparison. The current signal is that a dashboard says conversion improved by five percent without showing whether this means points or relative growth. I recommend that we standardize metric sentences and show both the numerator and denominator.
notes: 表达必须围绕汇报准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 项目状态更新：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: A status update separates completed work, current risk, next action and required decision.
Because milestone predictability matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、里程碑可预测性和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“项目状态更新”场景。已知项目状态被标为绿色，但关键依赖尚无确认的交付日期，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、里程碑可预测性、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A status update separates completed work, current risk, next action and required decision. The current signal is that the project is marked green although a critical dependency has no confirmed delivery date. I recommend that we use a red-amber-green update with evidence, owner and recovery date.
notes: 表达必须围绕里程碑可预测性说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

levels.chapter: 第 6 关 · 基础表达
levels.story: 你需要围绕收银台与支付方式完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 收银台与支付方式表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is checkout completion rate.
I recommend that we rank eligible methods by local usage while keeping fees and terms transparent.
We should scale only if complaints and payment-method errors do not increase.

questions.title: 收银台与支付方式：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because checkout completion rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Checkout design balances payment-method relevance, speed and customer trust.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、收银台完成率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“收银台与支付方式”场景。已知移动端客户看到冗长且未排序的支付方式列表后流失，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、收银台完成率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Checkout design balances payment-method relevance, speed and customer trust. The current signal is that mobile customers abandon after seeing a long unranked list of payment methods. I recommend that we rank eligible methods by local usage while keeping fees and terms transparent.

levels.chapter: 第 7 关 · 基础表达
levels.story: 你需要围绕银行卡支付链路完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 银行卡支付链路表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is end-to-end payment success.
I recommend that we map every response code to the exact payment stage and merchant-facing status.
We should scale only if no order is fulfilled before the required payment confirmation.

questions.title: 银行卡支付链路：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.

Because end-to-end payment success matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、端到端支付成功率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“银行卡支付链路”场景。已知支付服务商报告提交成功，但商户仍看到异常多的失败订单，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、端到端支付成功率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

The current signal is that the PSP reports successful submission while merchants still see an unusual number of failed orders. I recommend that we map every response code to the exact payment stage and merchant-facing status.
notes: 表达必须围绕端到端支付成功率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.title: 银行卡支付链路：高管摘要
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“银行卡支付链路”场景。已知支付服务商报告提交成功，但商户仍看到异常多的失败订单，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、端到端支付成功率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Bottom line: the PSP reports successful submission while merchants still see an unusual number of failed orders. The likely driver is that technical receipt is being confused with issuer approval and final order confirmation. I recommend that we map every response code to the exact payment stage and merchant-facing status; the decision needed today is whether to proceed under the guardrail that no order is fulfilled before the required payment confirmation.
notes: 表达必须围绕端到端支付成功率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、端到端支付成功率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“退款与争议运营”场景。已知客服向面临正式拒付的商户发送了退款操作说明，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、争议解决率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Refunds and chargebacks have different initiators, evidence paths and merchant impacts. The current signal is that support agents are sending refund instructions to merchants facing formal chargebacks. I recommend that we route cases by initiator, reason code, evidence deadline and financial exposure.

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“退款与争议运营”场景。已知客服向面临正式拒付的商户发送了退款操作说明，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

items: The primary metric is onboarding completion rate.

questions.title: 商户入驻：准确解释

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“费率与账单基础”场景。已知商户质疑账单，因为综合费率没有解释跨境费和退款费，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

The result created a measurable basis for improving billing accuracy, and I learned to define the guardrail before execution.
notes: 表达必须围绕账单准确率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

levels.title: 数据汇报
levels.subtitle: 在数据汇报场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释数据汇报问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 11 关 · 运营沟通
levels.story: 你需要围绕数据汇报完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 四句数据汇报卡
reward.description: 用固定顺序把数字变成可行动的业务判断。
items: Metric change: what changed and by how much.
Diagnosis: where and when the change happened.
Action: what we did and when we will update.

questions.title: 支付成功率下降

activity.prompt: 成功率从 92.4% 降至 90.8%，哪一种说法准确？
choices: It fell by 1.6 percent.
It fell by 1.6 percentage points.
It fell to 1.6 percentage points.
activity.feedback: 两个百分比相减得到百分点变化，因此应使用 percentage points。

questions.prompt: 本周整体支付成功率从 92.4% 降至 90.8%，主要来自德国银行卡支付，下降发生在周二路由调整后。
questions.task: 用 4 句英文汇报变化、定位、初步判断和行动。
questions.hint: 回答 where、when 和 what next。

answer.sample: Overall payment success rate fell 1.6 percentage points week over week, from 92.4% to 90.8%. Germany card payments accounted for about 70% of the decline, which began after Tuesday's routing change. The pattern suggests a route-specific issue. We have rolled back the change and will compare issuer response codes before tomorrow's review.
notes: 百分点使用 percentage points。
用 suggests 表达初步判断，避免把猜测说成事实。

questions.title: 交易额涨、收入降
questions.prompt: GMV 环比增长 12%，但支付净收入下降 3%。低费率大商户占比提高，通道成本也增加。
questions.task: 用英文解释表面矛盾，并提出两个需要进一步验证的分析。
questions.hint: 从 mix shift 和 unit economics 两条线展开。

answer.sample: GMV increased by 12% month over month, while net payment revenue declined by 3%. More volume came from large merchants on lower pricing tiers, and processing cost per transaction increased. We should separate the impact of merchant mix from cost inflation and review net revenue by merchant cohort to find deteriorating unit economics.
notes: while 适合对照两个方向相反的指标。
提出可执行的分解方法，而不是停留在猜测。

questions.title: 事故状态更新
questions.prompt: 东南亚电子钱包从 10:20 起出现超时，影响约 8% 的请求；11:05 已切换备用通道，成功率恢复。根因还在调查。
questions.task: 写一段英文事故更新，区分已知事实、恢复状态和待确认事项。
questions.hint: 根因未确定时不要使用 was caused by。

answer.sample: From 10:20 to 11:05, wallet payment timeouts affected approximately 8% of requests in Southeast Asia. We switched traffic to the backup channel at 11:05, and success rates have returned to normal. Payments are currently processing normally while we investigate the root cause. The next update will be shared by 1 p.m.
notes: 时间范围、影响比例和地区构成完整事实。
continues to investigate 保留根因不确定性。

questions.title: A/B 测试结论
questions.prompt: 新收银台使支付转化率提升 0.7 个百分点，95% 置信区间为 +0.2 至 +1.2 个百分点，退款率暂无显著变化。
questions.task: 用英文汇报结果、统计不确定性和上线建议。
questions.hint: 区分 no significant change 与 proven no impact。

answer.sample: The new checkout increased conversion by 0.7 percentage points, with a 95% confidence interval of 0.2 to 1.2 points. We did not detect a significant change in refunds, but the test was not designed to rule out small effects. I recommend a phased rollout with continued monitoring of conversion, refunds and support contacts.
notes: 同时给点估计和区间。
did not detect 不等于证明完全无影响。

questions.title: 高管一页摘要
questions.prompt: 活跃商户增长 18%，交易额增长 24%，但投诉率从 0.6% 升至 0.9%，主要是结算延迟。
questions.task: 写一个不超过 100 词的英文 executive summary，包含成绩、风险和下一季度重点。
questions.hint: 回答 so what，而不是罗列所有指标。

answer.sample: Q2 delivered strong growth: active merchants rose 18% and payment volume increased 24% quarter over quarter. However, complaints increased from 0.6% to 0.9%, mainly due to settlement delays. Growth is healthy, but the settlement experience may limit retention. In Q3, we will prioritize reliability, reduce delayed payouts by 50%, and add proactive merchant notifications.
notes: 先承认增长，再说明体验风险。
下一季度重点包含量化目标。

questions.title: 数据汇报：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because payment success rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
A payment performance report connects metric movement to a tested business explanation.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、支付成功率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“数据汇报”场景。已知总体成功率下降 2.4 个百分点，但最大市场保持稳定，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付成功率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A payment performance report connects metric movement to a tested business explanation. The current signal is that overall success fell by 2.4 points even though the largest market remained stable. I recommend that we decompose the change by market, method, issuer and response code.
notes: 表达必须围绕支付成功率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 数据汇报：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“数据汇报”场景。已知总体成功率下降 2.4 个百分点，但最大市场保持稳定，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、支付成功率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline payment success rate needs context because overall success fell by 2.4 points even though the largest market remained stable. Evidence points to the aggregate hides a payment-method mix shift in two fast-growing markets. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that the conclusion is supported by stable definitions and comparable cohorts.

A business presentation should move from decision context to evidence, recommendation and consequence.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、决策清晰度和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“商务演示与讲故事”场景。已知一份二十页的支付复盘分析准确，却没有以决策结束，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
The decision should balance speed with control.
Because response completion rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、回复完成率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“利益相关方邮件”场景。已知工程团队要求精确证据，而管理层关注业务后果，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、回复完成率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The decision should balance speed with control. Although the proposal may improve response completion rate, the evidence shows that one long update is being sent unchanged to every audience. We should keep one source of truth and tailor the opening, detail and requested action, but proceed only if all audience versions use the same metric definitions and decision status.
notes: 表达必须围绕回复完成率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

I suggest that we keep one source of truth and tailor the opening, detail and requested action, using whether all audience versions use the same metric definitions and decision status as our shared decision rule.
notes: 表达必须围绕回复完成率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

levels.title: 基础商务谈判

levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释基础商务谈判问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 15 关 · 运营沟通
levels.story: 你需要围绕基础商务谈判完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 基础商务谈判表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is commercial value retained.
I recommend that we trade volume commitment and term length for pricing while rejecting unconditional exclusivity.
We should scale only if service levels, compliance rights and exit terms remain enforceable.

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
A sound negotiation separates interests, positions, tradable terms and non-negotiable controls.
Because commercial value retained matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、保留的商业价值和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“基础商务谈判”场景。已知支付合作方在同一方案中要求更低费率和立即独家合作，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、保留的商业价值、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A sound negotiation separates interests, positions, tradable terms and non-negotiable controls. The current signal is that a payment partner requests a lower fee and immediate exclusivity in the same proposal. I recommend that we trade volume commitment and term length for pricing while rejecting unconditional exclusivity.
notes: 表达必须围绕保留的商业价值说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

items: The primary metric is authorization approval rate.

questions.title: 授权与拒绝码：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.

reward.title: 对账与结算运营表达卡

items: The primary metric is unreconciled transaction rate.

questions.title: 对账与结算运营：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because unreconciled transaction rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Reconciliation matches internal orders, provider transactions, fees and bank movements.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、未对账交易率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“对账与结算运营”场景。已知服务商调整文件时间后，财务看到结算差异持续扩大，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。

answer.sample: Reconciliation matches internal orders, provider transactions, fees and bank movements. The current signal is that finance sees a growing settlement difference after a provider changed file timing. I recommend that we rebuild matching rules around stable identifiers, timing windows and fee records.
notes: 表达必须围绕未对账交易率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.title: 对账与结算运营：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“对账与结算运营”场景。已知服务商调整文件时间后，财务看到结算差异持续扩大，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、未对账交易率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline unreconciled transaction rate needs context because finance sees a growing settlement difference after a provider changed file timing. Evidence points to transaction dates, settlement dates and time zones are being joined as if they were identical. questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、商户咨询率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Our shared goal is to improve merchant contact rate. We can be flexible on rollout timing, but we should not compromise the requirement that resolution time improves without hiding unresolved financial cases. A workable package is to restore clear status guidance and tag contacts by root cause for weekly review and review the result against agreed evidence.
notes: 表达必须围绕商户咨询率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 商户支持运营：面试复盘
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“商户支持运营”场景。已知看板改版后，关于待处理付款的咨询量翻倍，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、商户咨询率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The problem was that contacts about pending payouts doubled after a dashboard change. I analyzed the operating evidence, identified that the new status label does not explain the expected date or required merchant action, and recommended that we restore clear status guidance and tag contacts by root cause for weekly review. The result created a measurable basis for improving merchant contact rate, and I learned to define the guardrail before execution.
notes: 表达必须围绕商户咨询率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

levels.title: 会议与异议
levels.subtitle: 在会议与异议场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释会议与异议问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 21 关 · 复杂协作
levels.story: 你需要围绕会议与异议完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 会议推进表达卡
reward.description: 遇到模糊需求、不同意见和资源冲突时可以直接调用。
items: Could we clarify which outcome matters most?
My concern is ...; I would recommend ...
Before we close, let me confirm the owner and deadline.

questions.title: 澄清模糊需求

activity.prompt: 对方只说“we need better performance”，最佳回应是什么？
choices: Sure, we will improve it as soon as possible.
Could we clarify the target metric, scope and decision deadline?
Why was the requirement not defined before the meeting?
activity.feedback: 先澄清指标、范围和决策时间，才能把抽象要求转成可执行问题。

questions.prompt: 对方说“we need better payment performance”，但没有说明指标、市场或时间范围。
questions.task: 用英文提出三项澄清问题，并复述你理解的决策目标。
questions.hint: 围绕 metric、scope 和 decision。

answer.sample: To make sure we solve the right problem, could we clarify three points? Which outcome matters most: authorization rate, conversion or speed? Are we focusing on a specific market or method? What decision do we need to make, and by when? My current understanding is that we need to identify the largest recoverable conversion gap for the Q3 roadmap.
notes: 提供具体选项比开放式追问更高效。
最后复述目标以检验双方是否一致。

questions.title: 礼貌表达反对
questions.prompt: 产品负责人建议一次性向所有商户上线新路由，你认为风险过高，建议先灰度。
questions.task: 用英文认可目标、陈述反对理由、给出替代方案，并邀请讨论。
questions.hint: 反对方案，不反对人。

answer.sample: I agree that we should capture the conversion benefit quickly. My concern is the operational risk because our pilot covered only two markets. I recommend starting with 10% of eligible traffic, reviewing success and error codes for 48 hours, and expanding if the guardrails hold. Would that phased approach meet the commercial timeline?
notes: 先确认共同目标，减少对立。
替代方案包含流量、观察期和放量条件。

questions.title: 回应“没有资源”
questions.prompt: 工程团队说本季度没有 bandwidth 支持对账优化，但该问题每周造成 40 小时人工处理。
questions.task: 用英文确认约束，量化价值，并提出最小范围或换优先级的选择。
questions.hint: 先寻找 smallest valuable scope。

answer.sample: I understand that the team is fully allocated. The current gap, however, requires about 40 hours of manual work each week. Could we estimate a smaller first step, such as automating the top two mismatch types? If that is not feasible, I would like to compare this item with the lowest-priority committed project so leadership can make an explicit trade-off.
notes: 先承认资源约束。
量化机会成本，并要求明确取舍。

questions.title: 锁定负责人和日期
questions.prompt: 会议讨论很多，但结束前没人明确谁负责定价分析，截止时间也含糊。
questions.task: 用英文总结决定，并确认 owner、deliverable 和 deadline。
questions.hint: 直接点名确认，但给对方纠正空间。

answer.sample: Before we close, let me confirm the next step. We agreed to compare the current pricing model with a volume-based option. Maya, my understanding is that you will own the analysis and share a one-page recommendation by next Thursday. Is that scope and timing workable for you? I will document the dependencies today.
notes: 用 before we close 自然切换到会议收口。
确认产出是一页建议，而不是模糊的 analysis。

questions.title: 处理区域市场异议
questions.prompt: 总部希望统一商户激励政策，拉美团队认为当地现金流周期不同，统一政策会降低参与率。
questions.task: 用英文回应区域团队：验证关切、追问证据，并提出可验证的折中方案。
questions.hint: 不要立即否定，也不要无条件接受。

answer.sample: That concern makes sense if merchants operate on a longer cash-conversion cycle. Could you share the data showing where the standard policy creates the largest gap? We could keep the global eligibility rules but test a different payout schedule for a defined segment. If participation improves without higher loss, we would have evidence for a regional adjustment.
notes: 先解释 why it makes sense。
折中方案保持全球规则，只测试本地敏感变量。

questions.title: 会议与异议：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Constructive disagreement acknowledges the concern, tests the evidence and proposes a decision path.
Because decision closure rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、决策关闭率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“会议与异议”场景。已知区域和全球团队反复表达相反立场，却未就证据达成一致，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、决策关闭率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Constructive disagreement acknowledges the concern, tests the evidence and proposes a decision path. The current signal is that regional and global teams repeat opposing positions without agreeing on evidence. I recommend that we state the shared goal, isolate the disputed assumption and agree on a test.
notes: 表达必须围绕决策关闭率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 会议与异议：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“会议与异议”场景。已知区域和全球团队反复表达相反立场，却未就证据达成一致，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、决策关闭率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline decision closure rate needs context because regional and global teams repeat opposing positions without agreeing on evidence. Evidence points to the meeting is debating preferences rather than assumptions and thresholds. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that the final decision and remaining dissent are both documented.
notes: 表达必须围绕决策关闭率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 会议与异议：事故更新

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“事故更新”？
choices: We are investigating a situation in which regional and global teams repeat opposing positions without agreeing on evidence.
Because decision closure rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、决策关闭率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“会议与异议”场景。已知区域和全球团队反复表达相反立场，却未就证据达成一致，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、决策关闭率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: We are investigating a situation in which regional and global teams repeat opposing positions without agreeing on evidence. Current evidence points to the meeting is debating preferences rather than assumptions and thresholds, but the root cause is not yet final. We will state the shared goal, isolate the disputed assumption and agree on a test and provide the next fact-based update at the agreed time.
notes: 表达必须围绕决策关闭率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 会议与异议：提出建议
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“会议与异议”场景。已知区域和全球团队反复表达相反立场，却未就证据达成一致，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、决策关闭率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: My recommendation is to state the shared goal, isolate the disputed assumption and agree on a test. This directly addresses the evidence that the meeting is debating preferences rather than assumptions and thresholds. We will track decision closure rate and scale only if the final decision and remaining dissent are both documented.
notes: 表达必须围绕决策关闭率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 会议与异议：说明取舍

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“说明取舍”？
choices: The decision should balance speed with control.
Because decision closure rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、决策关闭率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“会议与异议”场景。已知区域和全球团队反复表达相反立场，却未就证据达成一致，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、决策关闭率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The decision should balance speed with control. Although the proposal may improve decision closure rate, the evidence shows that the meeting is debating preferences rather than assumptions and thresholds. We should state the shared goal, isolate the disputed assumption and agree on a test, but proceed only if the final decision and remaining dissent are both documented.
notes: 表达必须围绕决策关闭率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

levels.title: 跨区域协作
levels.subtitle: 在跨区域协作场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释跨区域协作问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 22 关 · 复杂协作
levels.story: 你需要围绕跨区域协作完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 跨区域协作卡
reward.description: 把本地关切转化为可验证、可治理的区域方案。
items: Localization adapts the full experience, not only the language.
We have not yet confirmed whether ...
Use a defined segment and explicit decision rules.

questions.title: 本地化不只是翻译

activity.prompt: 哪一句最准确地区分 translation 和 localization？
choices: Localization adapts the full experience to local behavior and requirements.
Localization means translating every sentence into the local language.
Translation includes regulation, payment methods and support operations.
activity.feedback: 本地化覆盖行为、产品、监管和运营，翻译只是其中一个语言环节。

questions.prompt: 总部认为把英文收银台翻译成西班牙语就完成了墨西哥本地化，你需要说明还缺什么。
questions.task: 用英文解释 translation 与 localization 的差别，并给出至少三个需要验证的本地因素。
questions.hint: 考虑支付方式、信任、格式、监管和客服。

answer.sample: Translation changes the language, while localization adapts the full experience to local behavior and requirements. For Mexico, we should validate preferred payment methods, installment expectations, address formats, trust messages, regulatory disclosures and support flows. We also need to test with local users rather than assume a translated global design will convert equally well.
notes: 用 changes 与 adapts 形成清楚对比。
列举因素覆盖产品、监管和运营。

questions.title: 市场进入建议
questions.prompt: 市场 A 规模大但合规复杂，市场 B 规模较小但已有支付伙伴。团队要选择先进入哪个。
questions.task: 用英文写一段建议，交代评价标准、不确定性和分阶段决策。
questions.hint: 建议也可以是先购买信息。

answer.sample: I recommend prioritizing Market B for the first launch while completing a regulatory feasibility assessment for Market A. Market A has greater long-term potential, but licensing uncertainty could change both cost and timing. Market B offers a faster path to validated demand through an existing partner. We can revisit Market A once the compliance estimate reaches decision quality.
notes: 明确短期行动与长期机会不是互相排斥。
建议体现速度、规模与不确定性的权衡。

questions.title: 跨时区工作约定
questions.prompt: 上海、伦敦和圣保罗团队共同上线项目，会议经常落在某一团队深夜，异步信息也不完整。
questions.task: 用英文提出包含会议轮换、异步文档、响应时限和紧急升级的工作约定。
questions.hint: 机制需要公平且可执行。

answer.sample: I propose a rotating meeting schedule so the same region does not always carry the late-hour burden. Decision topics should be posted at least 24 hours before the meeting, and each region should respond within one business day. Decisions and owners will be recorded after the call. Launch-critical incidents will use the on-call channel and named regional contacts.
notes: rotating schedule 体现时区负担公平。
明确时间标准，并区分日常与紧急沟通。

questions.title: 表达合规不确定性
questions.prompt: 新市场的促销返现是否构成受监管资金活动尚无结论，业务团队仍要求给上线日期。
questions.task: 用英文说明已知、未知、决策门槛和当前可以并行推进的工作。
questions.hint: 不要在未知时承诺日期。

answer.sample: We have not yet confirmed whether the cashback flow falls within the local regulated-funds perimeter. Legal expects an external opinion by 15 September, and that conclusion is a launch dependency. Until then, we should not commit to a public launch date. We can still complete product design, vendor due diligence and alternative fund-flow models.
notes: has not yet confirmed 精确表达当前状态。
列出可并行工作，避免团队完全停滞。

questions.title: 总部与本地目标冲突
questions.prompt: 总部要求统一提高支付费率以改善利润，本地团队担心头部商户流失。双方用不同指标证明自己正确。
questions.task: 用英文重构争议，提出共同目标、分层分析和决策规则。
questions.hint: 把“谁对”改成“什么情境下采取什么动作”。

answer.sample: Both teams are trying to improve sustainable net revenue, but Global emphasizes margin while the local team emphasizes retention. I suggest segmenting merchants by profitability, price sensitivity and strategic value, then estimating net revenue under several scenarios. We can raise prices where expected gains exceed churn risk, while using approved, time-limited exceptions for sensitive high-value merchants.
notes: 先定义 sustainable net revenue 作为共同目标。
例外需要批准和到期日期。

questions.title: 跨区域协作：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because regional launch readiness matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Cross-region execution distinguishes global principles from evidence-based local exceptions.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、区域上线准备度和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“跨区域协作”场景。已知全球支付流程在欧洲表现良好，却在东南亚造成流失，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、区域上线准备度、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Cross-region execution distinguishes global principles from evidence-based local exceptions. The current signal is that a global payment flow performs well in Europe but creates abandonment in Southeast Asia. I recommend that we define non-negotiable controls and pilot localized journey changes.
notes: 表达必须围绕区域上线准备度说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 跨区域协作：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“跨区域协作”场景。已知全球支付流程在欧洲表现良好，却在东南亚造成流失，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、区域上线准备度、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline regional launch readiness needs context because a global payment flow performs well in Europe but creates abandonment in Southeast Asia. Evidence points to local language, payment habits and regulatory steps were treated as translation details. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that local exceptions have an owner, expiry date and measurable rationale.
notes: 表达必须围绕区域上线准备度说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。

reward.title: 客户升级处理表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is escalation resolution time.
I recommend that we stop the faulty retry path, identify affected transactions and give the merchant timed updates.
We should scale only if no customer is charged twice and remediation is independently verified.

activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、升级案件解决时长和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“客户升级处理”场景。已知一家战略商户报告重复扣款，并威胁暂停支付流量，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、升级案件解决时长、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A strong escalation response combines empathy, verified facts, containment and a timed update. The current signal is that a strategic merchant reports duplicate charges and threatens to pause payment traffic. I recommend that we stop the faulty retry path, identify affected transactions and give the merchant timed updates.
notes: 表达必须围绕升级案件解决时长说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“客户升级处理”场景。已知一家战略商户报告重复扣款，并威胁暂停支付流量，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、升级案件解决时长、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline escalation resolution time needs context because a strategic merchant reports duplicate charges and threatens to pause payment traffic. Evidence points to a timeout retry bypassed one idempotency check during a provider incident. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that no customer is charged twice and remediation is independently verified.
notes: 表达必须围绕升级案件解决时长说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

reward.title: 欺诈与风险策略表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is fraud loss rate.
I recommend that we segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review.
We should scale only if fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost.

questions.title: 欺诈与风险策略：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Payment risk strategy balances fraud loss, approval, customer friction and review cost.
Because fraud loss rate matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、欺诈损失率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、欺诈损失率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Payment risk strategy balances fraud loss, approval, customer friction and review cost. The current signal is that a stricter rule reduced fraud but rejected many long-standing low-risk customers. I recommend that we segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 欺诈与风险策略：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、欺诈损失率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline fraud loss rate needs context because a stricter rule reduced fraud but rejected many long-standing low-risk customers. Evidence points to the rule uses one transaction threshold without customer-history features. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

answer.sample: We are investigating a situation in which a stricter rule reduced fraud but rejected many long-standing low-risk customers. Current evidence points to the rule uses one transaction threshold without customer-history features, but the root cause is not yet final. We will segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review and provide the next fact-based update at the agreed time.

questions.title: 欺诈与风险策略：提出建议
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、欺诈损失率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: My recommendation is to segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review. This directly addresses the evidence that the rule uses one transaction threshold without customer-history features. We will track fraud loss rate and scale only if fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

The decision should balance speed with control.

activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、欺诈损失率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

questions.title: 欺诈与风险策略：回应异议
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、欺诈损失率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: I understand the concern about adding operational complexity. However, the current signal is that a stricter rule reduced fraud but rejected many long-standing low-risk customers. I suggest that we segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review, using whether fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost as our shared decision rule.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

answer.sample: We propose a controlled pilot in which we segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review. The primary metric is fraud loss rate, and the guardrail is whether fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost. We will compare the pilot with a stable baseline before deciding whether to scale.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.title: 欺诈与风险策略：高管摘要
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、欺诈损失率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Bottom line: a stricter rule reduced fraud but rejected many long-standing low-risk customers. The likely driver is that the rule uses one transaction threshold without customer-history features. I recommend that we segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review; the decision needed today is whether to proceed under the guardrail that fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

Our shared goal is to improve fraud loss rate.

activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、欺诈损失率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。

answer.sample: Our shared goal is to improve fraud loss rate. We can be flexible on rollout timing, but we should not compromise the requirement that fraud savings exceed lost margin and manual-review cost. A workable package is to segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review and review the result against agreed evidence.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.title: 欺诈与风险策略：面试复盘
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“欺诈与风险策略”场景。已知更严格的规则降低了欺诈，却拒绝了许多长期低风险客户，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、欺诈损失率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The problem was that a stricter rule reduced fraud but rejected many long-standing low-risk customers. I analyzed the operating evidence, identified that the rule uses one transaction threshold without customer-history features, and recommended that we segment the rule by customer history and send uncertain cases to targeted review. The result created a measurable basis for improving fraud loss rate, and I learned to define the guardrail before execution.
notes: 表达必须围绕欺诈损失率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

levels.title: 3DS 与身份验证
levels.subtitle: 在3DS 与身份验证场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释3DS 与身份验证问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 27 关 · 复杂协作
levels.story: 你需要围绕3DS 与身份验证完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 3DS 与身份验证表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is authenticated payment conversion.
I recommend that we apply risk-based exemptions where allowed and monitor issuer-level outcomes.
We should scale only if regulatory compliance and fraud liability remain clear.

questions.title: 3DS 与身份验证：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
3DS strategy should apply the right authentication path by regulation, risk and issuer behavior.
Because authenticated payment conversion matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、验证支付转化率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“3DS 与身份验证”场景。已知强制挑战降低了欺诈，却造成移动端收银台大幅流失，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、验证支付转化率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: 3DS strategy should apply the right authentication path by regulation, risk and issuer behavior. The current signal is that mandatory challenges reduced fraud but created a sharp mobile checkout drop. I recommend that we apply risk-based exemptions where allowed and monitor issuer-level outcomes.
notes: 表达必须围绕验证支付转化率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

items: The primary metric is cross-border net margin.

questions.title: 跨境支付与外汇：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Because cross-border net margin matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Cross-border payment economics depend on currency, acquiring location, conversion and settlement design.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、跨境净利润率和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“跨境支付与外汇”场景。已知频繁换汇的支付走廊交易量增长，但利润率下降，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、跨境净利润率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Cross-border payment economics depend on currency, acquiring location, conversion and settlement design. The current signal is that volume is growing while margin falls in corridors with frequent currency conversion. I recommend that we measure corridor economics and offer local currency or settlement choices selectively.
notes: 表达必须围绕跨境净利润率说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 跨境支付与外汇：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“跨境支付与外汇”场景。已知频繁换汇的支付走廊交易量增长，但利润率下降，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、跨境净利润率、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline cross-border net margin needs context because volume is growing while margin falls in corridors with frequent currency conversion. Evidence points to pricing does not recover FX spread, cross-border assessment and settlement cost. items: The primary metric is cost per successful payment.
I recommend that we build a fully loaded cost model by method, market and success outcome.

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“支付成本分析”场景。已知较低的名义处理费在计入失败和人工工作后产生了更高总成本，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。

I recommend that we build a fully loaded cost model by method, market and success outcome.

choices: Because risk-adjusted acquiring value matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
The decision should balance speed with control.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、风险调整后的收单价值和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“收单布局策略”场景。已知本地收单可能提高批准率，却需要新实体、准备金和对账能力，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、风险调整后的收单价值、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The decision should balance speed with control. Although the proposal may improve risk-adjusted acquiring value, the evidence shows that the proposal compares approval uplift without the full operating model. We should prioritize markets where incremental margin exceeds setup and control cost, but proceed only if resilience and compliance do not depend on one untested partner.

questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、商户生命周期价值、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: I understand the concern about adding operational complexity. However, the current signal is that a large merchant requests custom features after moving only a small share of promised volume. I suggest that we create a joint plan that ties roadmap investment to measurable adoption, using whether custom work has reusable value or a funded commercial return as our shared decision rule.
notes: 表达必须围绕商户生命周期价值说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、分层服务成本和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“中小商户分层运营”场景。已知高接触服务被统一使用，而许多商户需要的是相同基础指引，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

I recommend that we combine self-service journeys with trigger-based specialist support.

questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、分层服务成本、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

notes: 表达必须围绕分层服务成本说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

questions.title: 中小商户分层运营：提出建议
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“中小商户分层运营”场景。已知高接触服务被统一使用，而许多商户需要的是相同基础指引，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

notes: 表达必须围绕分层服务成本说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、分层服务成本和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

levels.title: 平台与市场支付
levels.subtitle: 在平台与市场支付场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释平台与市场支付问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 37 关 · 策略设计
levels.story: 你需要围绕平台与市场支付完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 平台与市场支付表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is seller payout reliability.
I recommend that we tier payout controls by seller risk and explain hold reasons with release criteria.
We should scale only if fund flows and platform obligations remain legally and operationally clear.

questions.title: 平台与市场支付：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: Marketplace payments require clear responsibility for onboarding, split funds, refunds, reserves and payouts.
Because seller payout reliability matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、卖家付款可靠性和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“平台与市场支付”场景。已知卖家增长加速，但付款冻结和客服咨询同步上升，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、卖家付款可靠性、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Marketplace payments require clear responsibility for onboarding, split funds, refunds, reserves and payouts. The current signal is that seller growth is accelerating while payout holds and support contacts rise. I recommend that we tier payout controls by seller risk and explain hold reasons with release criteria.
notes: 表达必须围绕卖家付款可靠性说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。

reward.title: 高管治理与决策表达卡
reward.description: 完成本关后，可复用以下表达结构。
items: The primary metric is strategic decision quality.
I recommend that we assign one decision owner and publish thresholds for escalation and exception.

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“高管治理与决策”场景。已知三个委员会审查同一支付风险，却没有任何一个负责最终取舍，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？

I recommend that we offer earned volume tiers while preserving performance remedies and exit options.

I recommend that we present one integrated scenario with choices, downside and funded mitigations; the decision needed today is whether to proceed under the guardrail that uncertainty is quantified and no material risk is buried in an appendix.
notes: 表达必须围绕董事会决策信心说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 董事会级英文汇报：协商边界

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“协商边界”？
choices: Because board decision confidence matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
Our shared goal is to improve board decision confidence.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、董事会决策信心和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“董事会级英文汇报”场景。已知董事看到支付业务强劲增长，却质疑利润质量和运营集中度，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、董事会决策信心、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: Our shared goal is to improve board decision confidence. We can be flexible on rollout timing, but we should not compromise the requirement that uncertainty is quantified and no material risk is buried in an appendix. A workable package is to present one integrated scenario with choices, downside and funded mitigations and review the result against agreed evidence.
notes: 表达必须围绕董事会决策信心说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 董事会级英文汇报：面试复盘
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“董事会级英文汇报”场景。已知董事看到支付业务强劲增长，却质疑利润质量和运营集中度，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、董事会决策信心、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The problem was that directors see strong payment growth but question margin quality and operational concentration. I analyzed the operating evidence, identified that management reporting separates growth, economics and resilience into unrelated sections, and recommended that we present one integrated scenario with choices, downside and funded mitigations. The result created a measurable basis for improving board decision confidence, and I learned to define the guardrail before execution.
notes: 表达必须围绕董事会决策信心说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

levels.title: 英文面试
levels.subtitle: 在英文面试场景中练习准确表达与业务判断
levels.objective: 能够用清晰英文解释英文面试问题，并提出有证据、指标和护栏的行动建议。
levels.chapter: 第 50 关 · 高阶决策
levels.story: 你需要围绕英文面试完成十次工作沟通，从理解事实推进到形成可执行决策。

reward.title: 英文面试结构卡
reward.description: 从开场到追问，用结构代替临场背诵。
items: Introduction: present, evidence, future.
Project: situation, action, result, learning.
Failure: ownership, recovery, changed behavior.

questions.title: 60 秒自我介绍

activity.prompt: 哪一种自我介绍开场最容易建立岗位相关性？
choices: I graduated several years ago and then worked at three companies.
Let me walk you through every position on my resume.
I am a strategy and operations professional focused on turning data into scalable improvements.
activity.feedback: 先给职业定位和价值，再用项目证据支撑，比逐年复述简历更有效。

questions.prompt: 你面试支付策略运营岗位，需要在一分钟内建立与岗位的相关性，不能逐年复述简历。
questions.task: 写一个 90 至 120 词的英文自我介绍，包含定位、两项证据和求职方向。
questions.hint: 使用 present → evidence → future。

answer.sample: I am a strategy and operations professional focused on turning customer and transaction data into scalable improvements. In my recent work, I used funnel analysis to identify high-impact experience gaps and led projects across product, data and frontline teams with clear owners and measurable outcomes. I am now looking to apply that combination of analytics and execution to payment growth and merchant operations, where reliability, economics and customer experience must be managed together.
notes: 开头先给职业定位，而非学校和年份。
结尾展示对支付工作的具体理解。

questions.title: STAR-L 项目案例
questions.prompt: 面试官问：Tell me about a project where you improved a payment or customer journey.
questions.task: 写一个可替换数字的英文 STAR-L 答案，突出个人判断、行动、结果和复盘。
questions.hint: Situation 与 Task 要短，把篇幅留给 Action、Result 和 Learning。

answer.sample: Situation: We saw a [X%] drop between checkout and successful payment. Task: I was responsible for finding the main recoverable gap within six weeks. Action: I rebuilt the funnel by market, method and response code, found a weak routing rule, and aligned Product, Risk and Engineering on a guarded pilot. Result: Success improved by [X] points and recovered [amount] in monthly volume. Learning: I now define decision and rollback thresholds before launch.
notes: 使用 I rebuilt、I aligned 明确个人贡献。
Learning 是可复用的方法，而不是泛泛感想。

questions.title: 失败经历
questions.prompt: 面试官问 Tell me about a failure. 不能把优点包装成缺点，也不能把责任推给协作方。
questions.task: 写一个英文失败案例：真实错误、影响、补救、机制变化和后续证据。
questions.hint: 重点是 ownership 和 changed behavior。

answer.sample: I once launched a policy after validating the average impact but not smaller regional segments. The overall metric improved, yet complaints rose sharply in one segment and we paused the rollout. I owned the gap, contacted affected customers and rebuilt the analysis. I then added segment guardrails and a pre-launch checklist. In the next two launches, all segment metrics stayed within the agreed thresholds.
notes: 明确错误是自己验证维度不足。
用后续项目证明行为真正改变。

questions.title: 为什么这个岗位
questions.prompt: 面试官问 Why are you interested in this role? 需要避免只说平台大、发展好或对支付感兴趣。
questions.task: 写一个三部分英文答案：工作内容匹配、已有证据、希望扩展的能力。
questions.hint: 把 JD 中的具体问题与自己的经历连起来。

answer.sample: This role combines three types of work I do well: diagnosing performance with data, designing an operating strategy, and coordinating delivery across product and commercial teams. I have used funnel and cohort analysis to prioritize customer problems and translated findings into owned action plans. The role would let me apply those strengths to payment reliability and merchant growth while deepening my knowledge of payment economics and international operations.
notes: 从实际工作内容切入，不用空泛公司赞美。
用过去证据支持 fit，再说明能力延伸。

questions.title: 五分钟项目陈述
questions.prompt: 终面要求用五分钟介绍一个代表项目，然后接受追问。你需要控制结构，并主动暴露关键取舍。
questions.task: 写出英文陈述提纲和结尾可向面试官提出的两个高质量问题。
questions.hint: 使用 problem → insight → decision → execution → impact → reflection。

answer.sample:
Opening: I will describe a project where we improved [journey] through data diagnosis and cross-functional delivery.
1. Business problem and customer impact.
2. Insight that changed our understanding.
3. Options and the trade-off I recommended.
4. Pilot, owners, risks and disagreement.
5. Quantified impact and limitations.
6. What I would repeat or change.

Questions:
- Which payment or merchant metric is hardest for this team to improve today?
- How are decisions divided between global product and local operations?
notes: 主动讲 options 和 limitations，展示判断质量。
反问聚焦真实难题和决策机制。

questions.title: 英文面试：准确解释

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“准确解释”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
A strong payment strategy interview answer connects personal judgment, action, evidence and learning.
Because answer evidence quality matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、回答证据质量和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“英文面试”场景。已知候选人描述了团队活动，但面试官无法识别候选人的个人决策，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、回答证据质量、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: A strong payment strategy interview answer connects personal judgment, action, evidence and learning. The current signal is that a candidate describes team activity but the interviewer cannot identify the candidate's decision. I recommend that we use a concise STAR-L structure with explicit personal choices and quantified limits.
notes: 表达必须围绕回答证据质量说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 英文面试：解读指标
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“英文面试”场景。已知候选人描述了团队活动，但面试官无法识别候选人的个人决策，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、回答证据质量、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The headline answer evidence quality needs context because a candidate describes team activity but the interviewer cannot identify the candidate's decision. Evidence points to the story spends too long on context and uses we for every important action. Before making a decision, we should segment the data and verify that the claim can withstand follow-up questions about data, trade-offs and failure.
notes: 表达必须围绕回答证据质量说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 英文面试：事故更新

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“事故更新”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
We are investigating a situation in which a candidate describes team activity but the interviewer cannot identify the candidate's decision.
Because answer evidence quality matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、回答证据质量和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“英文面试”场景。已知候选人描述了团队活动，但面试官无法识别候选人的个人决策，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、回答证据质量、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: We are investigating a situation in which a candidate describes team activity but the interviewer cannot identify the candidate's decision. Current evidence points to the story spends too long on context and uses we for every important action, but the root cause is not yet final. We will use a concise STAR-L structure with explicit personal choices and quantified limits and provide the next fact-based update at the agreed time.
notes: 表达必须围绕回答证据质量说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 英文面试：提出建议
questions.prompt: 你正在处理“英文面试”场景。已知候选人描述了团队活动，但面试官无法识别候选人的个人决策，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击句子片段，将其排列成结论、证据和行动清晰的英文回答。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、回答证据质量、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: My recommendation is to use a concise STAR-L structure with explicit personal choices and quantified limits. This directly addresses the evidence that the story spends too long on context and uses we for every important action. We will track answer evidence quality and scale only if the claim can withstand follow-up questions about data, trade-offs and failure.
notes: 表达必须围绕回答证据质量说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

questions.title: 英文面试：说明取舍

activity.prompt: 哪一句最适合用于“说明取舍”？
choices: The safest response is to wait until every uncertainty disappears and avoid naming an owner or deadline.
The decision should balance speed with control.
Because answer evidence quality matters, we should launch globally before checking segments, evidence or controls.
activity.feedback: 正确表达同时保留了业务事实、回答证据质量和可执行判断，没有跳过证据或护栏。

questions.prompt: 你正在处理“英文面试”场景。已知候选人描述了团队活动，但面试官无法识别候选人的个人决策，需要用英文向跨团队同事说明判断并推动下一步。
questions.task: 点击最符合业务事实、策略逻辑和专业语气的英文表达。
questions.hint: 优先保留结论、证据、回答证据质量、行动和护栏，不要只复述背景。

answer.sample: The decision should balance speed with control. Although the proposal may improve answer evidence quality, the evidence shows that the story spends too long on context and uses we for every important action. We should use a concise STAR-L structure with explicit personal choices and quantified limits, but proceed only if the claim can withstand follow-up questions about data, trade-offs and failure.
notes: 表达必须围绕回答证据质量说明业务影响，避免只有语言形式而没有判断。
参考答案使用结论、证据、行动和护栏结构，可直接迁移到邮件、会议或面试。

translations.authorization-capture-settlement: 授权用于检查客户是否有足够的资金或信用额度，并临时预留相应金额。请款确认商户希望完成这笔扣款。结算发生在之后，资金通过支付链路划转至商户账户。因此，授权获批并不代表商户已经收到款项。
translations.refund-chargeback: 退款由商户发起，资金通过原支付方式退还。拒付由持卡人通过发卡行发起，用于对交易提出争议。商户可以提交证据，但也可能承担争议处理费并面临更高的拒付率。因此，拒付需要单独的调查处理流程。
translations.payment-participants: 发卡行为客户发卡，并决定是否批准交易。卡组织在发卡侧和收单侧之间路由交易信息。收单行为商户提供银行卡受理服务。支付服务商通过统一服务，将商户连接到一个或多个收单机构及支付方式。
translations.kyc-kyb-aml: KYC 用于验证个人客户的身份，KYB 则验证企业，包括注册信息和所有权结构。AML 是防止洗钱的整体框架。在商户入驻过程中，我们会对企业执行 KYB，对相关受益所有人执行 KYC，并根据风险进行 AML 筛查和持续监控。
translations.take-rate-net-revenue: 费率等于支付总收入除以支付交易规模。净收入还取决于处理成本、网络费用、激励支出和损失。费率提高并不必然带来同等幅度的净收入增长，因此应同时评估定价和单位经济。
translations.payment-basics-explain: 授权、请款和结算是银行卡支付中的不同阶段。当前信号是团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释。我建议发布统一的支付流程术语表，并在客服、产品和合作方复盘中使用。
translations.payment-basics-interpret: 支付状态准确率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释。证据表明运营手册没有定义各阶段的负责人和资金流转状态。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认每个状态都对应明确负责人、客户话术和对账处理方式。
translations.payment-basics-incident: 我们正在调查以下情况：团队混用支付术语，向商户提供了相互矛盾的解释。当前证据表明运营手册没有定义各阶段的负责人和资金流转状态，但根因尚未最终确认。我们将发布统一的支付流程术语表，并在客服、产品和合作方复盘中使用，并在约定时间提供下一次基于事实的更新。
translations.payment-basics-recommend: 我建议发布统一的支付流程术语表，并在客服、产品和合作方复盘中使用。这直接回应了“运营手册没有定义各阶段的负责人和资金流转状态”这一证据。我们将跟踪支付状态准确率，并且只有在每个状态都对应明确负责人、客户话术和对账处理方式时才扩大实施。
translations.payment-basics-tradeoff: 该决策应平衡速度与控制。虽然方案可能改善支付状态准确率，但证据表明运营手册没有定义各阶段的负责人和资金流转状态。我们应发布统一的支付流程术语表，并在客服、产品和合作方复盘中使用，但只有在每个状态都对应明确负责人、客户话术和对账处理方式时才继续推进。
translations.bluf-rewrite:
主题：建议将巴西试点推迟一周

我建议把巴西试点从 8 月 12 日推迟到 8 月 19 日。退款 API 有两个回归测试用例失败，现在上线可能造成大量人工退款并损害商户体验。工程团队将在周五前完成修复，运营团队将在周一重新执行检查清单。如在周四下午 3 点前没有异议，我会更新上线计划。
translations.polite-data-request: Elena，你好。可以请你在周三中午前提供过去八周按国家和支付方式拆分的支付成功率吗？我们需要这些数据制定第三季度恢复计划。CSV 包含周、国家、支付方式、尝试次数和成功支付次数即可，不需要制作幻灯片。如果无法提供完整数据，先提供前五大市场也足以让我们开始分析。
translations.delay-notice: 商户试点将从周一推迟到周三开始，因为最终风险规则还需要两天验证。目前没有商户数据受到影响，但销售团队应暂停确认上线。风险团队正在加急审查，我会在周二下午 4 点前发送是否上线的更新。
translations.action-minutes:
决定：在根因和修复方案完成评审前，我们将维持当前路由规则。

行动项：
1. 数据团队——周五前完成根因分析。
2. 产品团队——下周二前确认首选解决方案。
3. 运营团队——审批通过后，于下周三发送商户通知。

如果负责人或截止时间有误，请在明天中午前回复。
translations.executive-escalation: 我需要升级反馈付款对账工作流中尚未解决的责任人缺口。我们在前两次评审中都提出需要明确负责人，但验证任务至今无人负责。如果周五前仍未确定负责人，第三季度迁移很可能至少推迟一周。工作范围和投入已经记录，能否请你在周四前协调财务数据团队或支付数据团队承接？
translations.business-writing-explain: 高质量商务信息应先给出结论、证据和请求的行动。当前信号是管理者需要多轮追问才能理解决策事项和负责人。我建议用 BLUF 结构重写更新，并明确请求、负责人和截止时间。
translations.business-writing-interpret: 决策周转时间这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为管理者需要多轮追问才能理解决策事项和负责人。证据表明邮件先写时间线和背景，而不是业务影响。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认读者不打开附件也能理解第一段。
translations.business-writing-incident: 我们正在调查以下情况：管理者需要多轮追问才能理解决策事项和负责人。当前证据表明邮件先写时间线和背景，而不是业务影响，但根因尚未最终确认。我们将用 BLUF 结构重写更新，并明确请求、负责人和截止时间，并在约定时间提供下一次基于事实的更新。
translations.business-writing-recommend: 我建议用 BLUF 结构重写更新，并明确请求、负责人和截止时间。这直接回应了“邮件先写时间线和背景，而不是业务影响”这一证据。我们将跟踪决策周转时间，并且只有在读者不打开附件也能理解第一段时才扩大实施。
translations.business-writing-tradeoff: 该决策应平衡速度与控制。虽然方案可能改善决策周转时间，但证据表明邮件先写时间线和背景，而不是业务影响。我们应用 BLUF 结构重写更新，并明确请求、负责人和截止时间，但只有在读者不打开附件也能理解第一段时才继续推进。
translations.meeting-essentials-explain: 有效会议要把模糊讨论转化为明确决策和行动。当前信号是相同议题每周重复出现，因为参会者记住了不同结论。我建议每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项。
translations.meeting-essentials-interpret: 行动项关闭率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为相同议题每周重复出现，因为参会者记住了不同结论。证据表明主持人没有重述决策、负责人、截止时间和待解决问题。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期。
translations.meeting-essentials-incident: 我们正在调查以下情况：相同议题每周重复出现，因为参会者记住了不同结论。当前证据表明主持人没有重述决策、负责人、截止时间和待解决问题，但根因尚未最终确认。我们将每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项，并在约定时间提供下一次基于事实的更新。
translations.meeting-essentials-recommend: 我建议每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项。这直接回应了“主持人没有重述决策、负责人、截止时间和待解决问题”这一证据。我们将跟踪行动项关闭率，并且只有在每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期时才扩大实施。
translations.meeting-essentials-tradeoff: 该决策应平衡速度与控制。虽然方案可能改善行动项关闭率，但证据表明主持人没有重述决策、负责人、截止时间和待解决问题。我们应每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项，但只有在每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期时才继续推进。
translations.meeting-essentials-disagree: 我理解对增加运营复杂度的担忧。然而，当前信号是相同议题每周重复出现，因为参会者记住了不同结论。我建议每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项，并把“每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期”作为共同决策规则。
translations.meeting-essentials-pilot: 我们建议开展受控试点，在试点中每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项。主要指标是行动项关闭率，护栏是每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期。在决定是否扩大前，我们会把试点结果与稳定基线比较。
translations.meeting-essentials-executive: 结论是：相同议题每周重复出现，因为参会者记住了不同结论。可能的驱动因素是主持人没有重述决策、负责人、截止时间和待解决问题。我建议每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项；今天需要决定是否在“每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期”这一护栏下推进。
translations.meeting-essentials-negotiate: 我们的共同目标是改善行动项关闭率。我们可以在上线时间上灵活处理，但不能放弃“每个行动都有唯一负责人和日期”这一要求。可行的整体方案是每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项，并根据商定证据复盘结果。
translations.meeting-essentials-interview: 当时的问题是相同议题每周重复出现，因为参会者记住了不同结论。我分析了运营证据，识别出主持人没有重述决策、负责人、截止时间和待解决问题，并建议每个议题结束时进行口头总结并记录书面行动项。结果为改善行动项关闭率建立了可衡量基础，我也学会了在执行前先定义护栏。
translations.metric-language-explain: 有效的指标表达应包含基线、变化、时间窗和对照。当前信号是看板称转化率提升百分之五，却没有说明是百分点还是相对增幅。我建议统一指标句式，并同时展示分子和分母。
translations.metric-language-interpret: 汇报准确率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为看板称转化率提升百分之五，却没有说明是百分点还是相对增幅。证据表明汇报模板遗漏单位、分母和对比时间窗。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认每项汇报变化都能根据引用数据复现。

translations.status-updates-explain: 项目更新应区分已完成事项、当前风险、下一步行动和所需决策。当前信号是项目状态被标为绿色，但关键依赖尚无确认的交付日期。我建议采用红黄绿状态更新，并附证据、负责人和恢复日期。

translations.checkout-payments-explain: 收银台设计需要平衡支付方式相关性、速度和客户信任。当前信号是移动端客户看到冗长且未排序的支付方式列表后流失。我建议按本地使用情况排列可用支付方式，同时透明展示费用和条款。
translations.checkout-payments-interpret: 收银台完成率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为移动端客户看到冗长且未排序的支付方式列表后流失。证据表明所有市场和设备使用相同的支付方式排序。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认投诉和支付方式错误不增加。

translations.card-payment-flow-explain: 银行卡支付依赖商户、支付服务商、收单行、卡组织和发卡行之间的协同信息流。当前信号是支付服务商报告提交成功，但商户仍看到异常多的失败订单。我建议把每个响应码映射到准确的支付阶段和商户状态。
translations.card-payment-flow-interpret: 端到端支付成功率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为支付服务商报告提交成功，但商户仍看到异常多的失败订单。证据表明技术接收被误当成发卡行批准和最终订单确认。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认任何订单都不会在获得所需支付确认前履约。

translations.card-payment-flow-pilot: 我们建议开展受控试点，在试点中把每个响应码映射到准确的支付阶段和商户状态。主要指标是端到端支付成功率，护栏是任何订单都不会在获得所需支付确认前履约。在决定是否扩大前，我们会把试点结果与稳定基线比较。
translations.card-payment-flow-executive: 结论是：支付服务商报告提交成功，但商户仍看到异常多的失败订单。可能的驱动因素是技术接收被误当成发卡行批准和最终订单确认。我建议把每个响应码映射到准确的支付阶段和商户状态；今天需要决定是否在“任何订单都不会在获得所需支付确认前履约”这一护栏下推进。
translations.card-payment-flow-negotiate: 我们的共同目标是改善端到端支付成功率。我们可以在上线时间上灵活处理，但不能放弃“任何订单都不会在获得所需支付确认前履约”这一要求。可行的整体方案是把每个响应码映射到准确的支付阶段和商户状态，并根据商定证据复盘结果。
translations.card-payment-flow-interview: 当时的问题是支付服务商报告提交成功，但商户仍看到异常多的失败订单。我分析了运营证据，识别出技术接收被误当成发卡行批准和最终订单确认，并建议把每个响应码映射到准确的支付阶段和商户状态。结果为改善端到端支付成功率建立了可衡量基础，我也学会了在执行前先定义护栏。
translations.refund-dispute-ops-explain: 退款和拒付拥有不同的发起方、证据路径和商户影响。当前信号是客服向面临正式拒付的商户发送了退款操作说明。我建议根据发起方、原因码、举证期限和财务风险分流案件。
translations.refund-dispute-ops-interpret: 争议解决率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为客服向面临正式拒付的商户发送了退款操作说明。证据表明案件受理没有区分商户退款和发卡行主导的争议。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认证据在卡组织截止日前提交，且避免重复退款。
translations.refund-dispute-ops-incident: 我们正在调查以下情况：客服向面临正式拒付的商户发送了退款操作说明。当前证据表明案件受理没有区分商户退款和发卡行主导的争议，但根因尚未最终确认。我们将根据发起方、原因码、举证期限和财务风险分流案件，并在约定时间提供下一次基于事实的更新。
translations.refund-dispute-ops-recommend: 我建议根据发起方、原因码、举证期限和财务风险分流案件。这直接回应了“案件受理没有区分商户退款和发卡行主导的争议”这一证据。我们将跟踪争议解决率，并且只有在证据在卡组织截止日前提交，且避免重复退款时才扩大实施。
translations.refund-dispute-ops-tradeoff: 该决策应平衡速度与控制。虽然方案可能改善争议解决率，但证据表明案件受理没有区分商户退款和发卡行主导的争议。我们应根据发起方、原因码、举证期限和财务风险分流案件，但只有在证据在卡组织截止日前提交，且避免重复退款时才继续推进。
translations.refund-dispute-ops-disagree: 我理解对增加运营复杂度的担忧。然而，当前信号是客服向面临正式拒付的商户发送了退款操作说明。我建议根据发起方、原因码、举证期限和财务风险分流案件，并把“证据在卡组织截止日前提交，且避免重复退款”作为共同决策规则。

translations.merchant-onboarding-explain: 商户入驻需要平衡转化率、合规质量和首笔交易时间。当前信号是小商户在所有权文件环节流失，同时人工审核不断增加。我建议按企业类型定制清单，并在上传前展示示例。
translations.merchant-onboarding-interpret: 入驻完成率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为小商户在所有权文件环节流失，同时人工审核不断增加。证据表明文件要求没有按企业类型和风险等级解释。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认KYB 完整性和受益所有人核验仍符合政策。

translations.pricing-fees-basics-explain: 支付定价应区分商户费用、卡组织成本、处理成本和税费。当前信号是商户质疑账单，因为综合费率没有解释跨境费和退款费。我建议统一定价术语，并增加账单计算示例。
translations.pricing-fees-basics-interpret: 账单准确率这一核心指标需要结合背景解读，因为商户质疑账单，因为综合费率没有解释跨境费和退款费。证据表明商务条款与账单明细使用了不同定义。在做决定前，我们应细分数据，并确认每项收费都能追溯到已签署的商务条款。
translations.pricing-fees-basics-incident: 我们正在调查以下情况：商户质疑账单，因为综合费率没有解释跨境费和退款费。当前证据表明商务条款与账单明细使用了不同定义，但根因尚未最终确认。我们将统一定价术语，并增加账单计算示例，并在约定时间提供下一次基于事实的更新。
